page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64-based server instance powered by the custom Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and relies on a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reaching 267.02 GB/sec, placing it in the top 25% of tested configurations. Passmark memory benchmarks and database operations also score in the top 25%, with database operations registering at 26,041.42. Other metrics, including stress-ng CPU performance (1,818.28 single-core and 57,749.33 multi-core) and Redis SET operations (50.47 million operations per second), fall within the average range. LLM inference speeds for a 7B model reach 41.79 tokens/second for prompt processing and 17.56 tokens/second for text generation.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the custom Arm-based Yitian architecture offers a high density of dedicated physical cores relative to memory capacity, making it a viable option for compute-heavy workloads that do not require x86 instruction sets. However, users must note the lack of local storage and the absence of advanced vector or matrix extensions, such as AVX or AMX, which limits its suitability for workloads dependent on these specific hardware instruction sets.

This instance is suited for multi-threaded decompression tasks, database operations, static web serving, and moderate-scale language model inference. The dedicated core allocation and strong memory performance support parallel processing tasks that benefit from a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio without hyperthreading interference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized server powered by the 2.75 GHz Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU hardware. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and database operations, both ranking in the top 25%. Other metrics, such as stress-ng CPU performance and Redis SET operations, align with average tiers. The custom Arm architecture provides high physical core density, though it lacks x86-specific vector extensions like AVX. This instance is suited for multi-threaded decompression, database operations, static web serving, and moderate-scale machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64 server with 32 dedicated Yitian 710 cores, 64 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps bandwidth, delivering strong database and multi-threaded decompression performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64 server featuring 32 dedicated Yitian 710 cores, 64 GB RAM, and strong database benchmark performance.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core Arm-based compute instance delivering strong multi-threaded decompression and database performance with a balanced memory profile.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-core Alibaba Yitian 710 Arm processor running at 2.75 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and database benchmark performance
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
No local storage or dedicated GPU accelerators included
Suited for database operations, web serving, and parallel processing tasks
